audit_items.proof_trace: All pointer dereferences in this file operate on &use_count_ or &weak_count_ (addresses of member variables of a live sp_counted_base object), which are structurally non-null. The three atomic free functions (atomic_exchange_and_add, atomic_increment, atomic_conditional_increment) have no external callers in the codebase — only called internally from class member methods with member-variable addresses. No reachable code path can supply a null pointer to any dereference site.
